ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-24-2004 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-14-2004 Reset To Feb-24-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Petitioner Sandra A. Celi present in pro per for the minor, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the minor's father consent and notice, the Court continued this matter to Feb. 24, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218 for petitioner to serve notice.
